steps.t: Moria siege-engines and Moria catapults can be found in Drû-garmadh, south-east of Mekhem-bizru. Alrekur fears the siege-weaponry being built in Drû-g…
Alrekur is in Mekhem-bizru, north-west of Drû-garmadh. Alrekur will be pleased to hear the Moria siege-engines and Moria catapults being built in Drû-…
